name: O'Bannon Banking Company
description_short: O'Bannon Banking Company is an FDIC-insured bank offering checking, savings, mortgages, and lending services with a focus on agricultural customers.
description_long:
O'Bannon Banking Company is a regional FDIC-insured bank operating under full faith and credit of the U.S. Government. The bank maintains an online presence at obannonbank.com and provides traditional banking services to retail and business customers. Based on website content, the institution emphasizes accessibility through digital channels and community-focused financial solutions.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including online banking, checking and savings accounts, Kids Savings Club accounts, Visa credit cards, mortgages and home loans, Health Savings Accounts (HSAs), and mobile banking applications. Customers can make transfers, pay bills, and deposit checks through mobile apps. The bank also provides access to MoneyPass surcharge-free ATMs and maintains a fraud center for customer protection.

O'Bannon Bank distinguishes itself through specialized lending services targeting agricultural customers and families. The website emphasizes "A Lending Hand" for those whose "livelihood depends on agriculture," indicating a niche market focus. The institution offers MyCardRules card controls, new document filtering enhancements, and maintains customer awareness programs around fraud prevention and beneficial ownership requirements.

As a regional bank, O'Bannon serves customers in specific geographic markets and maintains traditional branch operations with published holiday closures. The bank enforces international debit card restrictions, requiring customers traveling outside the U.S. to contact customer service in advance. While offering standard banking conveniences, the institution operates within typical regional bank constraints regarding service area and product complexity. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking with login and account access
Visa credit cards with rewards and benefits
Agricultural lending and specialized farm financing
Mobile banking applications with check deposit
Fraud center and fraud alert monitoring
MyCardRules debit and credit card controls
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Specialized agricultural lending programs for farm-dependent customers
Mobile banking app with check deposit, bill pay, and transfer capabilities
Access to MoneyPass surcharge-free ATM network
Fraud center with dedicated phone line (855-293-2456) for customer protection
Kids Savings Club for youth financial education and savings
MyCardRules card control features for debit and credit cards
cons: International debit card restrictions require advance customer service contact for overseas travel
Regional bank with limited geographic service area compared to national banks
Website contains outdated content references and functional errors in stock ticker section
No apparent online account opening or application completion capability visible on website
Limited information about fee structures, APRs, or specific product terms on website
best_for: Agricultural customers and farm business owners seeking specialized lending
Regional customers seeking FDIC-insured banking with community bank service
Families interested in youth savings accounts and financial education
Customers preferring mobile and online banking convenience with fraud protection
diagnosis: O'Bannon Banking Company is best for regional customers seeking traditional FDIC-insured banking services, particularly those in agricultural sectors. The main caveat is that it operates as a regional bank with geographic limitations and appears to have limited online application functionality, requiring customers to visit branches or call for account opening and complex transactions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
